comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
Please see the attached screenshot. Looking at it again, it seems like self-promotion. I will move to annoyance.
Screenshot
Also, I will narrow the rule to select the first child. ```adblock temu.com###mainHeader > div > div > div:first-of-type[role="region"] ```

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/213083#issuecomment-4432283548
こちらで再現しません。コンテンツブロッカーのバグが疑われますので、一度、Safariの設定（iOSの設定アプリ→Safari）からコンテンツブロッカーをすべて無効化してから再度有効化し、Safariを再起動してください。次に、AdGuardアプリを開いて右上の回転する矢印を押しフィルタの更新をし、１分以上このウィンドウを開いたままにしておいてください。

issue.title: Add luhxebag.com to scam/malware filter - counterfeit brand + non-delivery fraud
issue.body:
## Domain to block

`luhxebag.com`

## Category

Scam / Counterfeit site / Non-delivery fraud

## Evidence

**luhxebag.com** is a counterfeit storefront impersonating the registered LUHXE brand ([luhxe.com](https://luhxe.com)), owned by The PocketPharma Store LLC (USPTO Trademark Registration #7656203).

The site:
- Sells counterfeit LUHXE-branded luxury bags at below-market prices
- Accepts payment via Square (credit/debit card)
- Does not deliver any goods (non-delivery fraud / wire fraud)
- Was registered 2025-07-04 (recently created, typical pattern for fraud sites)

## Technical profile

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Domain | luhxebag.com |
| Registrar | Spaceship Inc. |
| Created | 2025-07-04 |
| DNS | Cloudflare (gloria.ns.cloudflare.com) |
| CMS | WordPress + WooCommerce |
| Payment | Square |
| Google Analytics | G-PB0191NEBH |

## Legal context

- 15 USC §1114 (Lanham Act - trademark counterfeiting)
- 18 USC §1343 (Wire fraud - non-delivery scheme)
- USPTO Trademark Reg #7656203 (LUHXE mark)

## Reporter

Shrey Bakhai, operations partner for Luhxe Inc. / The PocketPharma Store LLC
Contact: shrey@grrbaow.com

## Requested action

Add `luhxebag.com` to AdGuard scam/malware filter to protect users from being defrauded.

issue.title: luhxebag.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
## Domain to block

`luhxebag.com`

## Category

Scam / Counterfeit site / Non-delivery fraud

## Evidence

**luhxebag.com** is a counterfeit storefront impersonating the registered LUHXE brand ([luhxe.com](https://luhxe.com)), owned by The PocketPharma Store LLC (USPTO Trademark Registration #7656203).

The site:
- Sells counterfeit LUHXE-branded luxury bags at below-market prices
- Accepts payment via Square (credit/debit card)
- Does not deliver any goods (non-delivery fraud / wire fraud)
- Was registered 2025-07-04 (recently created, typical pattern for fraud sites)

## Technical profile

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Domain | luhxebag.com |
| Registrar | Spaceship Inc. |
| Created | 2025-07-04 |
| DNS | Cloudflare (gloria.ns.cloudflare.com) |
| CMS | WordPress + WooCommerce |
| Payment | Square |
| Google Analytics | G-PB0191NEBH |

## Legal context

- 15 USC §1114 (Lanham Act - trademark counterfeiting)
- 18 USC §1343 (Wire fraud - non-delivery scheme)
- USPTO Trademark Reg #7656203 (LUHXE mark)

## Reporter

Shrey Bakhai, operations partner for Luhxe Inc. / The PocketPharma Store LLC
Contact: shrey@grrbaow.com

## Requested action

Add `luhxebag.com` to AdGuard scam/malware filter to protect users from being defrauded.

comment.body:
@zloyden This rule: `attackofthefanboy.com,destructoid.com,edmontonsun.com,gamepur.com,gamerjournalist.com,gameskinny.com,nj.com,primagames.com,siliconera.com,syracuse.com,themarysue.com,touchtapplay.com,wegotthiscovered.com#%#//scriptlet('ubo-aost', 'decodeURI', '/(?=^(?!.*\.js))/')` seems to be what fixes it. 

I tried excluding the rule to see what would happen and it started showing admiral again. I tested the rule on the other sites, and it seems to fix the issue for all of them.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

labels.name: T: Stealth Mode issue
labels.description: The problem caused by the Stealth Mode module

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.sbs.com.au/ondemand/watch/2496115267995](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sbs.com.au%2Fondemand%2Fwatch%2F2496115267995) ### Comment > Third-party authorisation header issue with SBS Australia. When trying to use sbs.com.au or myaccount.sbs.com.au, the account is unauthorised and cannot be used. Once the third-party authorisation header setting is disabled, it works. > > Once I add `@@||user-profile.pr.sbsod.com^$stealth=3p-auth` the SBS website, SBS On Demand and SBS My Account all work. ``` Username: @dotext ``` ### Screenshots

`||tools.pdf24.org/static/js/ads.js`

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: Submitting dangerous websites, hoping you will block these websites

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

下面的网站都是钓鱼网站，伪装成正版软件官网，但是其实不是正版网站，而且里面的软件还是病毒软件。域名包含“chrome”的是伪装成chrome下载网站的钓鱼网站。域名包含“todesk”的是伪装成软件todesk官网的钓鱼网站。域名包含“qishui”的是伪装成qishui音乐软件官网的钓鱼网站。含有“sougou”的域名是伪装成sougou输入法的钓鱼网站

```
m-chrome-chrome.com.cn
aisiapp.com.cn
engine-sogou.com
sagou.com.cn
use-sogou.com
sogou-ai.com.cn
qishuiyinyue-music.hl.cn
ww-qishui.com.cn
fanqa-youdao.com.cn
asm-youdao.com.cn
yinyue-qishui.hl.cn
dy-qishuimusic.hl.cn
www.e-sanpei.com
sxm-wps.com.cn
sowgou.com.cn
yi-todesk.com.cn
qishui-eom.com.cn
qishui.bj.cn
ch-qishui-music.com.cn
aisi-zhi.com.cn
qishuiyy.com.cn
qishuimusic-cn.hl.cn
od-todesk.com.cn
ql-qishui.com.cn
qishui-gf.com.cn
todesk-todesk.com.cn
huoronggh.com
pccare-360.cn
apps-wps-offce.com.cn
wpp-wps.cn
gf-qishuiapp.com.cn
music-qishuiyinle.hl.cn
sh-qishuimusic.com.cn
```

### Proposed solution

封禁网站。

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body: @woshidadi2026 Please sort lists by a company/site/service, which are imitated by scammers.

comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -63,6 +74,68 @@ After you have installed the necessary tools, you need to set up the repository.
    If AGLint passes, your PR will be reviewed by a maintainer.
 1. If the review is successful, your changes will be merged into the `master` branch.
 
+### Rule placement
+
+- By default, new rules should be placed at the top of the relevant section in the filter file.
+
+  ```diff
+  !NOTE: Regular rules
+
+  + example.org##.banner-ads
+  ||example.com/ads/*
+  ```
+
+- If the new rule shares the same domain with an existing group of rules,
+  insert it **within that group** in ascending order by domain name, rather than at the top of the section.
+
+  ```diff
+  ! Example group
+  ||example.org/images/ads/*
+  + ||example.org/scripts/tracking.js
+  example.org##.example-ads
+  ```
+
+- For groups of mixed-type rules sharing the same domains,
+  add the new domain either at the **beginning** or **at the end**.
+  This makes it easy to visually compare the lists if they become out of sync:
+
+  ```diff
+  - example.com,example.org###ads
+  + test.com,example.com,example.org###ads
+  - adserver.com$domain=example.com|example.org
+  + adserver.com$domain=example.com|example.org|test.com
+  ```
comment.body:
Not what I suggested - for the same domain lists you added the the beginning AND at the end.

```
-example.com,example.org###ads
+example.com,example.org,test.com###ads
-||example.com^$domain=example.com|example.org
+||example.com^$domain=example.com|example.org|test.com
-||ads.com^$domain=example.com|example.org
+||ads.com^$domain=example.com|example.org|test.com
```

In other words, if there is a set of rules for a number of sites, their order should be preserved. The only difference is the separator (`,` or `|`)

comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -40,10 +40,17 @@ After you have installed the necessary tools, you need to set up the repository.
 ## Workflow for submitting changes
 
 1. Create a new branch for your changes. Please use the following naming convention:
-   - `fix-#{issue-number}-{website-domain}` — for breakage or unblocking fixes
-   - `upd-#{issue-number}-{website-domain}` — for filter updates or additions
+   - `{prefix}/{description}`
+   - `{prefix}/{issue-number}-{description}`
+   - `{prefix}/{third-party-repo-prefix}-{issue-number}-{description}`
 
-   Example: `fix-#12345-example.com`
+   Where `{prefix}` is `fix` for breakage/unblocking fixes or `upd` for filter updates/additions.
comment.body: Both are for fixing issues and adding rules. `upd` - if you forgot to add some changes in fix commit (not complete fix) or changes is not a complete feature (minor changes in docs, for example). For minor improvements.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: Submitting dangerous websites, hoping you will block these websites

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

下面的网站都是钓鱼网站，伪装成正版软件官网，但是其实不是正版网站，而且里面的软件还是病毒软件。域名包含“chrome”的是伪装成chrome下载网站的钓鱼网站。域名包含“todesk”的是伪装成软件todesk官网的钓鱼网站。域名包含“qishui”的是伪装成qishui音乐软件官网的钓鱼网站。含有“sougou”的域名是伪装成sougou输入法的钓鱼网站

```
m-chrome-chrome.com.cn
aisiapp.com.cn
engine-sogou.com
sagou.com.cn
use-sogou.com
sogou-ai.com.cn
qishuiyinyue-music.hl.cn
ww-qishui.com.cn
fanqa-youdao.com.cn
asm-youdao.com.cn
yinyue-qishui.hl.cn
dy-qishuimusic.hl.cn
www.e-sanpei.com
sxm-wps.com.cn
sowgou.com.cn
yi-todesk.com.cn
qishui-eom.com.cn
qishui.bj.cn
ch-qishui-music.com.cn
aisi-zhi.com.cn
qishuiyy.com.cn
qishuimusic-cn.hl.cn
od-todesk.com.cn
ql-qishui.com.cn
qishui-gf.com.cn
todesk-todesk.com.cn
huoronggh.com
pccare-360.cn
apps-wps-offce.com.cn
wpp-wps.cn
gf-qishuiapp.com.cn
music-qishuiyinle.hl.cn
sh-qishuimusic.com.cn
```

### Proposed solution

封禁网站。

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body: I'm not sure what is broken. however, I did notice that when you click any content on the site it redirects to: `https://www.ashemaletube.com/units/live/ppnd/?l=en-US`. On Chrome it redirects and shows a continue button to get to the actual content, and on Firefox it redirects the current page to that URL and opens the content in a new tab.

comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -63,6 +74,68 @@ After you have installed the necessary tools, you need to set up the repository.
    If AGLint passes, your PR will be reviewed by a maintainer.
 1. If the review is successful, your changes will be merged into the `master` branch.
 
+### Rule placement
+
+- By default, new rules should be placed at the top of the relevant section in the filter file.
+
+  ```diff
+  !NOTE: Regular rules
+
+  + example.org##.banner-ads
+  ||example.com/ads/*
+  ```
+
+- If the new rule shares the same domain with an existing group of rules,
+  insert it **within that group** in ascending order by domain name, rather than at the top of the section.
+
+  ```diff
+  ! Example group
+  ||example.org/images/ads/*
+  + ||example.org/scripts/tracking.js
+  example.org##.example-ads
+  ```
+
+- For groups of mixed-type rules sharing the same domains,
+  add the new domain either at the **beginning** or **at the end**.
+  This makes it easy to visually compare the lists if they become out of sync:
+
+  ```diff
+  - example.com,example.org###ads
+  + test.com,example.com,example.org###ads
+  - adserver.com$domain=example.com|example.org
+  + adserver.com$domain=example.com|example.org|test.com
+  ```
comment.body:
> But why did you initially recommend placing the new domain at the end in the first rule?

for non-mixed-type single rules or groups (only cosmetic, or only URL blocking, for example).

comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -63,6 +74,68 @@ After you have installed the necessary tools, you need to set up the repository.
    If AGLint passes, your PR will be reviewed by a maintainer.
 1. If the review is successful, your changes will be merged into the `master` branch.
 
+### Rule placement
+
+- By default, new rules should be placed at the top of the relevant section in the filter file.
+
+  ```diff
+  !NOTE: Regular rules
+
+  + example.org##.banner-ads
+  ||example.com/ads/*
+  ```
+
+- If the new rule shares the same domain with an existing group of rules,
+  insert it **within that group** in ascending order by domain name, rather than at the top of the section.
+
+  ```diff
+  ! Example group
+  ||example.org/images/ads/*
+  + ||example.org/scripts/tracking.js
+  example.org##.example-ads
+  ```
+
+- For groups of mixed-type rules sharing the same domains,
+  add the new domain either at the **beginning** or **at the end**.
+  This makes it easy to visually compare the lists if they become out of sync:
+
+  ```diff
+  - example.com,example.org###ads
+  + test.com,example.com,example.org###ads
+  - adserver.com$domain=example.com|example.org
+  + adserver.com$domain=example.com|example.org|test.com
+  ```
comment.body:
That rules - example of one group of mixed-type rules.

look:

1. `example.com,example.org,test.com`
2. `example.com|example.org|test.com`
3. `example.com|example.org|test.com`

Domains order is the same. It's immediately clear that the list contains no missing items. And if you add domains in a consistent manner, the list will be easier to read.

> We don't like generic CSS rules. These may block the popup, but without unblocking scrolling.

That is what this rule is for
`#$#html.pum-open.pum-open-overlay.pum-open-scrollable { overflow: auto !important; }`
We don't like generic CSS rules. These may block the popup, but without unblocking scrolling.

comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -40,10 +40,17 @@ After you have installed the necessary tools, you need to set up the repository.
 ## Workflow for submitting changes
 
 1. Create a new branch for your changes. Please use the following naming convention:
-   - `fix-#{issue-number}-{website-domain}` — for breakage or unblocking fixes
-   - `upd-#{issue-number}-{website-domain}` — for filter updates or additions
+   - `{prefix}/{description}`
+   - `{prefix}/{issue-number}-{description}`
+   - `{prefix}/{third-party-repo-prefix}-{issue-number}-{description}`
 
-   Example: `fix-#12345-example.com`
+   Where `{prefix}` is `fix` for breakage/unblocking fixes or `upd` for filter updates/additions.
comment.body: I see. But I'm not sure how to revise this sentence. Could you share the draft so it aligns with your intention?

@@ -63,6 +74,68 @@ After you have installed the necessary tools, you need to set up the repository.
    If AGLint passes, your PR will be reviewed by a maintainer.
 1. If the review is successful, your changes will be merged into the `master` branch.
 
+### Rule placement
+
+- By default, new rules should be placed at the top of the relevant section in the filter file.
+
+  ```diff
+  !NOTE: Regular rules
+
+  + example.org##.banner-ads

comment.body:
> If there is a set of rules for a number of sites, their order should be preserved.

Got it. But why did you initially recommend placing the new domain at the end in the first rule? 

Because it is wrong:

```diff
-example.com,example.org###ads
+example.com,example.org,test.com###ads
```

It is correct what I know.

```diff
-example.com,example.org###ads
+test.com,example.com,example.org###ads
```

Any reason for not using the existing rule?
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/86de3805689411106a64f6cda2f960f71174ea48/BaseFilter/sections/specific.txt#L1123
